title: Midnight Jamaican Pudding
description: A rich and creamy pudding dessert inspired by Jamaican flavors, perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the condensed milk, water, and pudding mix.
Whisk until the pudding mix is fully dissolved.
Add the egg and whisk until well combined.
Add the vanilla extract and baking spices, and whisk to combine.
If using dark rum, stir it in at this point.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until the pudding thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the heavy cream.
Pour the pudding mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled and set.
Serve cold, garnished with a sprinkle of cinnamon or nutmeg if desired.
